description: Output-format contracts from CLAUDE.md plus fixtures. The eval:structure suite checks generated outputs against `contracts`. Pure/rule-based contracts (booking_code) are validated against `fixtures` with no LLM and pass at M0. Pulse/fee/greeting contracts require generated output (M2/M3) and report 'pending' until then.

valid: Welcome back! This week our investors are talking most about expense ratio clarity. How can I help you book a call?
invalid: Welcome back! How can I help you book a call?
